name: Remind รักอีกครั้งก็ยังเป็นเธอ
original_name: Remind รักอีกครั้งก็ยังเป็นเธอ
overview: Noon, a former gangster who once worked as a ruthless debt collector, left that dark path behind after a life-changing incident. Now, she’s on the run from her old gang, led by Top, who relentlessly hunts her down. Eventually, Noon is cornered and forced to return to her old ways. This leads her to cross paths with Vicky, a blind woman who accidentally gets involved in a critical situation. Noon reluctantly takes Vicky hostage, keeping a constant watch over her. As they spend more time together, their relationship deepens, and love begins to blossom. Vicky’s world inspires Noon to change, to become someone worthy of her love. But it’s uncertain if this transformation will be enough to sustain their love or if it’s already too late. Follow their journey in REMIND: Love Again, and It’s Still You.
